languages.text: {n}Голос Номоса умолкает — на этот раз навсегда. Вокруг вас — обычный гул корабельных систем. Несмотря на кажущуюся привычной обстановку, вы отчетливо ощущаете лакуну — исчезновение чего-то фундаментального из недр корабля. Словно душа судна лишилась своей сердцевины.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Голос Номоса умолкает — на этот раз навсегда. Вокруг вас — обычный гул корабельных систем. Несмотря на кажущуюся привычной обстановку, вы отчетливо ощущаете лакуну — исчезновение чего-то фундаментального из недр корабля. Словно душа судна лишилась своей сердцевины.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

Despite the seemingly ordinary surroundings, you feel the void with terrible clarity. The disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nomos' Stimme verstummt, dieses Mal für immer. Du hörst nur noch das vertraute Summen der Systeme des Schiffs. Trotz der scheinbar vertrauten Umgebung spürst du die Abwesenheit mit schrecklicher Klarheit ... das Verschwinden eines fundamentalen Elements des Kerns des Schiffes. Als wäre dem Herz des Schiffes die Seele entrissen worden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nomos' Stimme verstummt, dieses Mal für immer. Du hörst nur noch das vertraute Summen der Systeme des Schiffs. Trotz der scheinbar vertrauten Umgebung spürst du die Abwesenheit mit schrecklicher Klarheit ... das Verschwinden eines fundamentalen Elements des Kerns des Schiffes. Als wäre dem Herz des Schiffes die Seele entrissen worden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}诺莫斯的声音沉寂了下去——而这一次，是永远沉寂。你耳边只剩舰船系统那熟悉的嗡鸣声。尽管周围的一切都很熟悉，你却异常清晰地感受到某种缺失——某种根本性的东西从舰船的核心消失了，就好像舰船的灵魂被从心脏处生生撕走。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}诺莫斯的声音沉寂了下去——而这一次，是永远沉寂。你耳边只剩舰船系统那熟悉的嗡鸣声。尽管周围的一切都很熟悉，你却异常清晰地感受到某种缺失——某种根本性的东西从舰船的核心消失了，就好像舰船的灵魂被从心脏处生生撕走。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nomos se tait pour de bon. Vous n'entendez plus que le bourdonnement familier des systèmes du vaisseau. Même si vous connaissez bien cet endroit, vous sentez très nettement une absence. Un élément fondamental de votre vaisseau vient de disparaître. C'est comme si son âme lui avait été arrachée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nomos se tait pour de bon. Vous n'entendez plus que le bourdonnement familier des systèmes du vaisseau. Même si vous connaissez bien cet endroit, vous sentez très nettement une absence. Un élément fondamental de votre vaisseau vient de disparaître. C'est comme si son âme lui avait été arrachée.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nomos enmudece, esta vez para siempre. No oyes más que el murmullo familiar de los sistemas de la nave a tu alrededor. Aunque el entorno no ha cambiado, sientes la ausencia con una claridad terrible: la desaparición de algo que era fundamental para la esencia misma de la nave. Como si le hubieran arrancado el alma del corazón.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

Como si le hubieran arrancado el alma del corazón.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nomos'un sesi bu kez sonsuza dek susuyor. Etrafındaki gemi sistemlerinin tanıdık uğultusundan başka bir şey duymuyorsun. Etrafın tanıdık görünse de yokluğu, geminin tam kalbinden temel bir şeyin yok oluşunu korkunç bir netlikle hissediyorsun. Sanki geminin ruhu sökülüp alınmış gibi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nomos's voice falls silent, this time forever. You hear nothing but the familiar hum of the ship's systems around you. Despite the seemingly familiar surroundings, you feel the absence with terrible clarity — the disappearance of something fundamental from the vessel's very core. As if the ship's soul has been torn from its heart.{/n}

Etrafın tanıdık görünse de yokluğu, geminin tam kalbinden temel bir şeyin yok oluşunu korkunç bir netlikle hissediyorsun. Sanki geminin ruhu sökülüp alınmış gibi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ノモスの声は、もう二度と聞こえてこない。船のシステムのいつもの唸り声だけが聞こえる。船の内部は、いつもと変わらないように見えるが、その核心から何かが消えたことに、あなたは恐怖を感じている。まるで船の魂が心臓から引き裂かれたような。{/n}
